response.justification: The candidate has roughly 14 years of solid full-stack software engineering experience, but the role calls for a Director-level Principal Engineer in AI strategy with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms. The resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling and no evidence of AI/ML depth, cloud-platform strategy leadership, or director-level influence.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background
Long track record of shipping products across domains
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products
Lacks director-level scope or strategic leadership signals
Limited deep cloud-platform or infrastructure-strategy experience
